testcase.name: test_rubric_simplify_requires_rubric_text

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty rubric_text, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration21_features.py:145: in test_rubric_simplify_requires_rubric_text assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for empty rubric_text, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty rubric_text, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
